commands.summary: New backend/src/channels.ts compiles under strict TypeScript: provider-neutral contracts for channel kinds, capability discovery, outbound send, send results, inbound webhook normalization, delivery-status normalization, media refs, redacted provider errors, credential validation, and voice call control, plus a channel registry.

4/4: the registry discovers capabilities and lists providers, selects a provider that supports a capability, and rejects unsupported capabilities cleanly (UnsupportedCapabilityError for an unknown capability, a provider that lacks it, and an unknown provider); send conforms to the SendResult contract.
Full suite green with channels.test.js wired into the pipeline; existing messaging/renderer/lifecycle/security behaviour unchanged.

environment.process_note: First slice of work item 015 Phase 0. Delivers the CLV-002 provider-neutral channel/adapter contracts and the capability registry with provider selection and clean rejection of unsupported capabilities. It does NOT yet move existing Twilio SMS/MMS behind the boundary (CLV-002's second acceptance bullet and CLV-003) and does not yet write the runtime-model document (CLV-001), so CLV-001/002/003 remain pending; those are the next slices. The existing Twilio path is untouched.
